summary: In summary, ivory wax, modeling wax, and utility wax are all appropriate materials that can be employed effectively when constructing an indirect wax pattern because they serve specific roles within this process such as providing detail precision, flexible form-fitting capabilities essential during initial design stages before final castings take place; whereas inlay wax serves distinctively internal restorative functions unrelated specifically towards exterior indirect patterning needs outlined herein contextually speaking appropriately concluding rationale aligns closely
